# Test Google Drive server tool definitions (with fake credentials)
env GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS=fake_credentials.json  
env GOOGLE_TOKEN=fake_token.json
exec go run . --timeout=5s
stdin tools_request.json
wait 5s
stdout '"error"'

-- tools_request.json --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}

-- fake_credentials.json --
{"client_id":"fake","client_secret":"fake","redirect_uris":["http://localhost"]}

-- fake_token.json --
{"access_token":"fake","refresh_token":"fake","token_type":"Bearer"}
